name: kade-cups-face
prompt: Medium two-shot. Dark-haired young man cupping silver-haired woman's face with both hands, burn-scarred fingers against pale cheeks. Her facing him, eyes closed or nearly closed. Intimate framing. Heat and cold meeting in visible steam. Warm amber and cool blue mixing. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Kade
dialogue.text: Your ice is melting. And you're letting it.

name: almost-kiss-eyes
prompt: Close-up two-shot profile. Dark-haired young man and silver-haired woman faces inches apart, almost touching. His amber eyes looking at her lips, her ice-blue eyes half-closed. Breath visible between them as steam where heat meets cold. Warm amber and cool blue light mixing. Intimate tension. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: rei-shouldnt
prompt: Close-up. Silver-haired woman's face, lips barely parted, expression conflicted and vulnerable. Ice-blue eyes downcast, wanting. Warmth on her cheeks. Surrender and resistance in the same breath. Soft warm lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-but-you-do
prompt: Close-up on lips. Male lips slightly curved, confident, warm. Knowing. Heat visible. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style
